title: Google I/O 2026: 3 things you need to know
summary: Google announced Gemini Spark, which integrates directly into Gmail, Drive, and Calendar with pre-loaded context. Unlike competitors like Claude Cowork and Codex, it requires minimal setup and targets everyday users rather than power users.
